articles.title: Patch for Windows Defender 0-day could allow attackers to fill hard disk
articles.content: The feud between NightmareEclipse and Microsoft shows no signs of resolving soon.
articles.titleZh: Windows Defender 0-day修补程序可能允许攻击者填充硬盘
articles.contentZh: NightmareEclipse和微软之间的争执没有很快解决的迹象。

articles.title: Allstate accuses Broadcom of auditing it because it quit VMware, CA
articles.content: Broadcom accuses Allstate of dodging VMware audits.
articles.titleZh: Allstate指责Broadcom对其进行审计，因为它退出了加利福尼亚州的VMware

articles.title: Google pays $250K for Linux vulnerability allowing guest VM escapes
articles.content: Both vulnerabilities allow untrusted users to gain root privileges.
articles.titleZh: 谷歌为Linux漏洞支付$ 250K ，允许访客虚拟机逃逸
articles.contentZh: 这两个漏洞都允许不受信任的用户获得root权限。

articles.title: Aussie gov't tells volunteers to throw out thousands of functioning test routers
articles.content: But the devices could "easily be reflashed."
articles.titleZh: 澳大利亚政府要求志愿者扔掉数千台功能正常的测试路由器
articles.contentZh: 但这些设备可以“轻松刷新”。

articles.title: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
articles.content: Lorde was performing at the Real Cool Festival in Madrid on Thursday and took some time during her set to speak out against AI glasses. While she didn't specify any brands in particular, it's likely she was taking a shot at festival sponsor Ray-Ban, which has collaborated with Meta on a pair of AI smartglasses. […]
articles.titleZh: Lorde说Ray-Ban Meta AI眼镜“不性感”
articles.contentZh: Lorde周四在马德里的Real Cool音乐节上表演，并在演出期间花了一些时间反对人工智能眼镜。虽然她没有具体说明任何品牌，但她很可能是在与电影节赞助商雷朋（ Ray-Ban ）合作，后者与Meta合作开发了一副人工智能智能眼镜。[…]

articles.title: Shall We Go On Sinning So That Grace May Increase? is hypnotic, healing, and hopeful
articles.content: Matmos are an incredibly accomplished duo between their own solo records like the masterpiece A Chance to Cut Is a Chance to Cure and production classic Bjork records like Vespertine. But Drew Daniel, one half of Matmos, is fiendishly prolific. When he's not literally dreaming up new viral music genres, he's also putting out records […]
articles.titleZh: 我们应该继续犯罪，以便恩典可以增加吗？是催眠，治愈和充满希望的
articles.contentZh: Matmos是他们自己的独奏唱片（如杰作《A Chance to Cut Is a Chance to Cure》）和制作经典Bjork唱片（如《Vespertine》）之间令人难以置信的成就二人组合。但马特莫斯的一半德鲁·丹尼尔（ Drew Daniel ）非常多产。当他不是在梦想新的病毒式音乐流派时，他也在推出唱片[…]
